description_for_human: Maps priorities to grounded Microsoft Build sessions.
description_for_model: Use this plugin to map enterprise signals to grounded Microsoft Build 2026 sessions. Call match_sessions for each normalized signal and get_session_by_code when looking up a specific session code. Do not invent sessions outside tool results. Compose agendas only from returned metadata. When a result set is empty, say there is no grounded match and do not guess.

functions.name: match_sessions
functions.description: Match a customer or priority signal to grounded Microsoft Build 2026 sessions. Returns up to limit on-demand sessions by default, strongest first.

signal.description: Atomic priority, challenge, initiative, or pain point.

instructions: Use only metadata returned by match_sessions.
When the returned result set is empty, say there is no grounded match.
Do not guess or invent sessions, codes, titles, or links.

functions.name: get_session_by_code
functions.description: Return full normalized metadata for one Build 2026 session code from the authoritative catalog.

instructions: Use only metadata returned by get_session_by_code.
If the session is not found, give a clean not-found response.
